authors.author: Ralph Carmichael
Ralph Carmichael
In den Sternen Gottes Werk ich seh

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He's everything, He's everything to me; He's everything, He's everything to me; He's my father, my mother, My sister and my brother, He's everything to me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know it was the Blood, I know it was the Blood, I know it was the Blood for me; One day when I was lost, He died upon the Cross, I know it was the Blood for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the roll is called up yonder, When the roll is called up yonder, When the roll is called up yonder, When the roll is called up yonder, I'll be there.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In that city where the Lamb is the light, The city where there cometh no night; I've a mansion over there, and when free from toil and care, I am going where the Lamb is the light.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Leave it there, leave it there, Take your burden to the Lord And leave it there; If you trust and never doubt, He will surely bring you out; Take your burden to the Lord And leave it there.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He abides, He abides, Hallelujah, He abides with me I'm rejoicing night and day, As I walk the narrow way, For the Comforter abides with me.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hold to God's unchanging hand! Hold to God's unchanging hand! Build your hopes on things eternal, Hold to God's unchanging hand!
